arts.ttl: Honduras handed punishment after Mexico coach hit with beer can thrown from stands
arts.sum: No fans allowed next time - but Honduras hold a first-leg lead

arts.ttl: Honduras punished after Mexico boss hit by beer can
arts.sum: Honduras are ordered to play their next home match behind closed doors after Mexico coach Javier Aguirre is hit by a full can of beer.

arts.ttl: When is Mexico vs Honduras? How to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: Watch Mexico vs Honduras via FuboTV (Free Trial) Reappointed new El Tri boss Javier Aguirre will be looking for his first silverware and has called up a squad that includes plenty of experience and new faces with the likes of Edson Álvarez, Raúl Jiménez, Ángel Sepúlveda and Henry Martín who are tied for second place among Liga MX top scorers in the Apertura 2024 season set to play some role in the Honduras double header.
